posts.author: JWILZCPA (Jeff Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Would anyone be able to provide some expert opinion on developing solutions based on worksapce templates.

I was wondering if I had to go the route of purchasing a Monday.com file simply to act as my sandbox for template development. Something telles me building these in m working file could cause some operational disturbances. Does Monday offer a free sandbox?

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Jeff! You can sign up for a free sandbox account here! Let us know if you have any further questions!
